description:
The marketing director at GardenWorld has approved a spring garden promotion. Create a new marketing campaign in iDempiere with the following details:

- Search Key: SPRING-GARDEN-2025
- Name: Spring Garden Promotion 2025
- Description: Seasonal promotion on garden supplies and outdoor furniture targeting residential customers
- Start Date: 04/01/2025
- End Date: 06/30/2025
- Costs (Planned Budget): 15000
- Organization: GardenWorld (or default *)
